data.title: Peab Issues SEK500 Million Green Bonds
data.description:
Peab (PEAB-B.ST) on Tuesday issued 500 million kronor of green bonds with a three-year term, according to a Wednesday release.

The bonds are subject to a variable interest rate equal to the three-month Stockholm interbank offered rate plus 1.50 percentage points.

Settlement of the bonds is expected by March 20. Proceeds from the issuance will be used for the Swedish construction company's investments in green and energy buildings, as well as green initiatives, including sustainable transportation and water management and measures.

data.title: Rheinmetall forecasts 2025 sales jump on Ukraine war, US decoupling
data.description:
Rheinmetall , a major beneficiary of Europe's renewed push to invest in defence, said on Wednesday it expects significant sales growth in 2025 and promised to update guidance after recent geopolitical developments are taken into account.

The German defence company expects sales to grow by 25% to 30% in 2025 as a result of the Russian invasion of Ukraine and the decoupling of the United States from Europe, it said.

At the same time, Rheinmetall anticipates an improvement in the operating result and an operating margin of around 15.5%, slightly above the 2024 level of 15.2%.

However, it said the outlook did not take into account "improvement in market potential that is expected to arise in the markets that are particularly relevant" and said it would make adjustments as customer needs become more specific.

Last week, European leaders backed plans to spend more on defence and continue to stand by Ukraine in a world upended by President Donald Trump's reversal of U.S. policies.

The European Commission wants to mobilise up to 800 billion euros ($863 billion) for European defence, including a plan to borrow up to 150 billion euros to lend to national governments.

The company reported group sales of 9.75 billion euros for 2024, under the 9.99 billion in a company-provided estimate by analysts polled by Vara Research.

($1 = 0.9174 euros)

data.title: Britain's L&G profit rises 6%, outlines $6.4 bln capital return plan
data.description:
Legal & General reported a forecast-beating 6% rise in annual core operating profit on Wednesday, helped by record volumes of retail annuities sales, and outlined plans to return more than 5 billion pounds ($6.46 billion) to investors via buybacks and dividends over the next three years.

($1 = 0.7742 pounds)

($1 = 0.7745 pounds)

data.title: TINC Posts FY Operating Income Of EUR 71.8 Million
data.description:
Tinc NV :

  • PORTFOLIO RESULT FOR THE PAST FINANCIAL YEAR (ENDING DECEMBER 31, 2024) IS € 50.7 MILLION

  • FY NET PROFIT OF € 42.5 MILLION OR € 1.17 PER SHARE

  • PROPOSES A GROSS DISTRIBUTION TO ITS SHAREHOLDERS OF €0.58 PER SHARE FOR THE CURRENT FINANCIAL YEAR ENDING DECEMBER 31, 2024

  • TINC IS PREPARING A POTENTIAL CAPITAL INCREASE TO SUPPORT ITS STRATEGIC GROWTH AMBITION OF DOUBLING ITS PORTFOLIO

  • FY SHAREHOLDERS EQUITY EUR 13.93 PER SHARE

  • TO FOCUS ON BROADENING PORTFOLIO WITH INVESTMENTS IN CORPORATE INFRASTRUCTURE, AND ON REALIZING ECONOMIES OF SCALE BY DEPLOYING ON AVERAGE LARGER INVESTMENT AMOUNTS

  • FY OPERATING INCOME EUR 71.8 MILLION

  • FY FAIR VALUE OF INVESTMENT PORTFOLIO EUR 512.1 MILLION

  • ON TRANSACTIONS WITH GIMV: ALL REGULATORY APPROVALS WERE OBTAINED ON MARCH 10, 2025

data.title: Wacker Chemie sees rise in 2025 sales on silicones, semiconductor-grade polysilicon
data.description:
German's Wacker Chemie said 2025 sales are likely to increase from last year due to growth across regions and a surge in volume, especially in silicone products and semiconductor-grade polysilicon, albeit at slightly lower selling prices.

The speciality chemicals producer on Wednesday forecast 2025 sales of 6.1 billion to 6.4 billion euros ($6.65 billion to $6.98 billion), compared with 5.72 billion euros in 2024.

It sees its annual earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortisation (EBITDA) in the range of 700 million to 900 million euros.

"Demand for our silicones, especially for specialty products, and semiconductor-grade polysilicon continues to show a very positive development. We expect to see higher volumes in these areas this year," Chief Executive Christian Hartel said in a statement.

He said, however, that the environment will remain challenging with the weak economy still influencing the order patterns of many customers.

The Munich-based group anticipates a 2025 sales growth of around 10% in its silicones division

In the polysilicone, and sees the sales of the polysilicon segment between 1.0 billion euros and 1.3 billion euros, up from the 949 million it achieved in 2024, through a substantial increase in semiconductor-grade polysilicon volumes, it added.

Wacker Chemie also said it will propose a dividend of 2.50 euro per share, corresponding to a payout of 124 million euros.

($1 = 0.9172 euros)

data.title: IonQ Insider Sold Shares Worth $37,446,600, According to a Recent SEC Filing
data.description:
Peter Hume Chapman, Director, Executive Chair, on March 11, 2025, sold 2,000,000 shares in IonQ for $37,446,600. Following the Form 4 filing with the SEC, Chapman has control over a total of 414,363 common shares of the company, with 414,363 shares held directly.

SEC Filing:

www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1824920/000141588925007746/xslF345X05/form4-03122025_010316.xml

data.title: S2 Resources to Begin Drilling Across Multiple Projects
data.description:
S2 Resources is set to start an extensive drilling program across several of its projects in Western Australia, New South Wales, and Victoria, according to a Wednesday filing with the Australian bourse.

Drilling, comprised of air core, reverse circulation, and diamond drilling, will begin in late March, the filing said.

The Company will conduct air core drilling at the Fosterville Gold Project to test gold targets identified by recent induced polarisation surveys, followed by potential RC or diamond drilling, the filing said.

In April or May, diamond drilling will target copper-gold porphyry anomalies at the Glenlogan project in New South Wales, with RC drilling at West Murchison to follow in May or June, pending heritage approvals, the filing added.

Lastly, diamond drilling will start at the Warraweena project in June or July to explore geophysical targets in northern New South Wales, per the filing.

data.title: Juli Sling Signs 59 Million Yuan Deal for the Construction of Saudi Arabia's King Fahd Stadium
data.description:
Juli Sling agreed to be the designated designer and supplier for the construction of Saudi Arabia's King Fahd Stadium for 59.2 million Saudi riyals, according to a Shenzhen Stock Exchange disclosure on Wednesday.

The contract, which is valid for 12 months, was signed with Saudi Binladin Group Contracting, an engineering and construction company, the Chinese lifting and rigging equipment manufacturer said.

The company's shares rose more than 2% in recent trade.

data.title: SML Isuzu Secures New Order Worth INR247.1 Million for Supply of Troops Carriers
data.description:
SML Isuzu has secured a new order worth 247.1 million Indian rupees from the Indian Air Force, Department of Military Affairs under the Ministry of Defence of India, according to a Wednesday filing to the Indian stock exchanges.

The contract is for the supply of 114 units of four-wheel drive, troops carrier with 20 seats to be completed by July 9.
